---
title: "Mary Susanna Lee"
---

## Mary Susanna Lee

**Dates:** (1846-1908)

### Description

one of the co-authors of <i>The Miz Maze</i>

### Biography

The title page of <i>The Miz Maze</i> calls her Mary Susanna Lee, and CMY describes her as the author of <i>Rosamond Fane</i>,  confirming that she was the same person as the Mary Lee who collaborated with Catherine Lee. She may be the M.S. Lee who contributed a story to <i>MP</i> (December 1887).  

According to an obituary in the <i>Athenaeum</i> (29 August 1908), 240, she was the daughter of a doctor, and collaborated with her sisters Catherine and Frances.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 20th 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
